ns0:entry.ns0:title: Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Donchitos/Claude-Code-Game-Studios
Language: shell
Turn Claude Code into a full game dev studio — 49 AI agents, 72 workflow skills, and a complete coordination system mirroring real studio hierarchy.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Osmantic/ODS
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Osmantic/ODS
Language: shell
Turn your PC, Mac, or Linux box into an AI server. LLM inference, chat UI, voice, agents, workflows, RAG, and image generation.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/VoltAgent/awesome-claude-code-subagents
Language: shell
A collection of 100+ specialized Claude Code subagents covering a wide range of development use cases

ns0:entry.ns0:title: a2aproject/A2A
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/a2aproject/A2A
Language: shell
Agent2Agent (A2A) is an open protocol enabling communication and interoperability between opaque agentic applications.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: armbian/build
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/armbian/build
Language: shell
The official build framework for the Armbian Linux distribution. This repository contains the complete toolchain and scripts required to compile custom OS images from source, including kernel configuration, U-Boot handling, and board-specific tweaks for various ARM and ARM64 single-board computers.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: cloudflare/skills
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/cloudflare/skills
Language: shell
Skills for teaching agents how to build on Cloudflare.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: github/copilot-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/github/copilot-cli
Language: shell
GitHub Copilot CLI brings the power of Copilot coding agent directly to your terminal.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: jqssun/android-titanium-browser
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/jqssun/android-titanium-browser
Language: shell
Secure open-source Android browser with support for extensions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: msitarzewski/agency-agents
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/msitarzewski/agency-agents
Language: shell
A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: nvm-sh/nvm
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/nvm-sh/nvm
Language: shell
Node Version Manager - POSIX-compliant bash script to manage multiple active node.js versions

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pi-hole/pi-hole
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pi-hole/pi-hole
Language: shell
A black hole for Internet advertisements

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pwnerblu/surrealra1n
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pwnerblu/surrealra1n
Language: shell
Tether downgrade tool for some checkm8/usbliter8 64bit devices. Some restores may utilize seprmvr64 by Mineek.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: pystardust/ani-cli
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/pystardust/ani-cli
Language: shell
A cli tool to browse and play anime

ns0:entry.ns0:title: urbanadventurer/Android-PIN-Bruteforce
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/urbanadventurer/Android-PIN-Bruteforce
Language: shell
Unlock an Android phone (or device) by bruteforcing the lockscreen PIN. Turn your Kali Nethunter phone into a bruteforce PIN cracker for Android devices! (no root, no adb)
